base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of brick_block_hit_empty — a effect_layer from 1985 super mario bros. Empty bump — brick-block contains no power-up so it just bumps up and returns without shattering (played when Small Mario hits). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Empty bump — brick-block contains no power-up so it just bumps up and returns without shattering (played when Small Mario hits)
